productDisplayName: Jockey Essence Nude-Coloured Full-Coverage Cross Over Bra 1242
description: Article number: 1242Skin-coloured bra, has panelled, double-layered cups with taping that has scalloped edging, a bow detail at the centre, elasticated and adjustable shoulder straps with scalloped edging, elasticated band under the bust, three rows of double hook-and-eye closure on the back for an adjustable fit Owing to intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
